P1.name: Diagnosis Quality
P1.description: Did the agent ask questions to understand the driver before pitching?

P2.name: Role Matching Accuracy
P2.description: Were the right roles pitched based on driver context?

P3.name: Clarity of Numbers & Benefits
P3.description: Were salary figures and benefits clearly communicated?

P4.name: Tone & Adaptability
P4.description: Was the caller polite, warm, and adaptive to driver responses?

P5.name: Closing Strength
P5.description: Was a clear next step set? Did the driver show interest?

P3: Extra perks (rental trips / paid leaves / flexibility)
P5: Next step set (meeting / WhatsApp / license / trial)

top_gaps.item: Extra perks (rental trips / paid leaves / flexibility)

Abhishekh.recommendation: Always state specific salary numbers and key benefits (insurance, weekend offs) clearly. Drivers need concrete figures to decide.
